steps.title: Match units to the term
steps.content: The equation $18h+15c=780$ represents total dollars earned. Since $h$ is hours at the regular job, $18h$ is dollars earned there.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: A coefficient multiplying hours to produce dollars is a dollars-per-hour rate. Therefore, $18$ is the amount earned for each hour at the regular job. The answer is A.
